    Customer Portal Access Information

    Username:
    The Username is always the contacts email address. It will be automatically substituted in the email body in place of "{USERNAME}" when the email sends.

    Password:
    The password is randomly generated. It will replace any current password the user has if this email is sent. It will be automatically substituted in the email body in place of "{PASSWORD}" when the email sends.

    Destinations
    An order can have one or multiple destinations.

    You can use a destination to split up quantites from your
    products and assign them different addresses.

    Each destination can be tracked here or through the queues in
    the Production Module.
    Available Quantity
    This table shows the quantity from each Product that is available to assign to a Destination.

    Clone Order
     
    Clone To:

    New Description:

    New PO Number:

    The Order you are attempting to clone is using "TaxJar Tax Group" which is no longer enabled in your system. Please select a Legacy Tax Group for the Cloned Order.


    Cloning Options
    Update Pricing?
    Pricing and/or other billing item settings may have changed since the original order was created. Check this box to update to the latest pricing and settings.
    Remove all discounts, includes both Product and Order level.
    Update Pricing To Current has to be enabled to be able to remove discounts.

    Check this box to remove all retail overrides for parts, modifiers and layout modifiers.
    Check box to clone proofs. Uncheck box to clear proofs on cloned order.

    Check this box to clone product notes. Uncheck this box to clear all product notes.


    Update to Currently Assign Salesperson

    Check this box to clone the associated vendor purchase orders.
